reason: Response A uses more distinctive, unexpected metaphorical constructions ("the way water finds the lowest part of a field," "carried the earlier theme like something rescued from deep water") and structural choices that feel characteristic of my writing style — particularly the short, declarative final sentences that reframe everything preceding them.
